zh.lifeSummary: 當Judith d'Auvergne於1130年出生在法國奧維普-德-o時，她的父親Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE35歲，母親Anne de NEVERS21歲。她於1151年與Béraud V de Mercoeur結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1170年之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Judith d'Auvergne于1130年出生在法国奧維普-德-o时，她的父亲Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE35岁，母亲Anne de NEVERS21岁。她于1151年与Béraud V de Mercoeur结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于1170年之前。

nameMeanings.name: Judith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘Jewess’ or ‘woman from Judea’, borne by a Jewish heroine whose story is recorded in the Book of Judith in the Apocrypha. Judith is portrayed as a beautiful widow who delivers her people from the invading Assyrians by gaining the confidence of their commander, Holofernes, and cutting off his head while he is asleep; without their commander, the Assyrians are duly routed. This has been a perennially popular Jewish name. In the English-speaking world it was taken up in the 16th century, having been in occasional use among Gentiles before this: for example, it was borne by a niece of William the Conqueror. It enjoyed great popularity between the 1940s and the 1960s. Today's notable bearers include the American novelist  Judith Krantz  (  b. 1928 ) and the Scottish composer  Judith Weir  (  b. 1954 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Judith d'Auvergne was born in 1130, in Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, France, her father, Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE, was 35 and her mother, Anne de NEVERS, was 21. She married Béraud V de Mercoeur in 1151. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died before 1170.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Judith d'Auvergne est née en 1130, à Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, France, son père, Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Anne de NEVERS, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Béraud V de Mercoeur en 1151. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée avant 1170.

de.lifeSummary: Als Judith d'Auvergne 1130 in Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE 35 und ihre Mutter Anne de NEVERS 21. Sie hat 1151 Béraud V de Mercoeur geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb vor 1170.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Judith d'Auvergne è nata il nel 1130 nel Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Francia, sua padre, Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Anne de NEVERS, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Béraud V de Mercoeur nel 1151. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì prima del 1170.

ja.lifeSummary: Judith d'Auvergneが1130年にフランスアウバーグンプウイ-デ-ドoメで生まれた時，父Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNEは35歳，母Anne de NEVERSは21歳であった。1151年にBéraud V de Mercoeurと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女は1170年以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Judith d'Auvergne(이)가 1130년 프랑스 오버그니 푸이-데-드o에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne de NEVERS(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1151년 Béraud V de Mercoeur(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1170년 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Judith d'Auvergne nasceu em 1130, em Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, França, seu pai, Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Anne de NEVERS, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Béraud V de Mercoeur em 1151. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ela faleceu antes 1170.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Judith d'Auvergne родилась в 1130 г. в местности пуи-де-дoм, аувиргн, Франция, её отцу по имени Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne de NEVERS, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Béraud V de Mercoeur в 1151 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла перед 1170 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Judith d'Auvergne nació en 1130, en Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Francia, su papá, Guillaume VIII d'AUVERGNE, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Anne de NEVERS, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Béraud V de Mercoeur en 1151. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió antes de 1170.
